mncDrawOrderByLayer.Description: Plugin serves to change the draworder according to the layers
mncDrawOrderByLayer.FullDescription: Plugin processes the layers marked with check marks in the window, changing the drawing order according to the order of the marked layers. There is a mode "Auto", which automatically changes the order of drawing objects on one of the two specified layers when creating or editing
mncDrawOrderByLayer.h13: Save the current position of layers in the drawing
mncDrawOrderByLayer.h14: Load and apply the layer position stored in the current drawing. Layers that have been added after the position is saved will be moved to the end of the list
mncDrawOrderByLayer.h15: Move the selected layer to the beginning of the list
